top_signals.title: Treasuries Pare Drop in Oil-Driven Move Tied to Iran War
top_signals.summary: Treasuries pared declines, pulling two-year yields back from a more than 15-month high, as reports of a ceasefire between Israel and Iran eased the upward pressure on oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yemen’s Houthis declare ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea: statement
top_signals.summary: Yemen’s Houthis announced a missile attack on Israel on Monday and declared a ban on Israeli shipping in the Red Sea, raising the spectre of a return to major disruption on the key route. “We declare a complete and total ban on Israeli maritime navigation in the Red Sea,” said a statement from the Houthis, ...

top_signals.title: Emerging Kansai artists to watch
top_signals.summary: Among the artists featured at Art Osaka, several offered particularly engaging takes on the ubiquity of digital technology and relationships between people and nature.
